acceptedDecisions.title: Route protection remains options-controlled
acceptedDecisions.rationale: Prevents accidental lockouts while staged protection rollout and inventory governance continue.
acceptedDecisions.futureTrigger: Only revisited if rollout strategy abandons options-based compatibility.

acceptedDecisions.title: Ownership backfill write-path remains disabled
acceptedDecisions.rationale: No real apply execution until staged governance evidence and future ADR enablement are approved.
acceptedDecisions.futureTrigger: Separate future ADR for staged write-path enablement is approved.

acceptedDecisions.title: Global EF query filters are deferred
acceptedDecisions.rationale: Global filters must not be enabled before ownership evidence and enforcement strategy are complete.
acceptedDecisions.futureTrigger: Future ADR for global filters is accepted with migration and compatibility plan.

acceptedDecisions.title: Database row-level security is deferred
acceptedDecisions.rationale: DB RLS requires explicit operational ownership and enforcement ADR beyond current stage.
acceptedDecisions.futureTrigger: Future ADR for DB RLS is accepted with rollback and operational model.

acceptedDecisions.title: Full tenant isolation is not claimed
acceptedDecisions.rationale: Current controls are staged/partial and must not be represented as full isolation.
acceptedDecisions.futureTrigger: Revisit only after enforcement ADRs and production evidence are complete.

deferredDecisions.title: Real staging apply enablement
deferredDecisions.rationale: Staging apply remains intentionally disabled in P7.
deferredDecisions.futureTrigger: ADR-FUTURE-001 accepted with validated staging executor enablement gates.

deferredDecisions.title: Real production apply enablement
deferredDecisions.rationale: Production apply remains intentionally disabled and requires separate approval chain.
deferredDecisions.futureTrigger: ADR-FUTURE-002 accepted with explicit production enablement controls.

deferredDecisions.title: Real ownership backfill execution
deferredDecisions.rationale: No real ownership metadata writes are permitted in current boundary.
deferredDecisions.futureTrigger: Write-path ADR and staged enablement evidence approved.

rejectedAlternatives.title: Enable apply immediately after dry-run
rejectedAlternatives.rationale: Dry-run alone is insufficient for safe write enablement.
rejectedAlternatives.futureTrigger: None; replaced by staged evidence and future ADR process.

rejectedAlternatives.title: Manual docs without machine-readable guardrails
rejectedAlternatives.rationale: Unvalidated prose-only governance drifts and weakens safety guarantees.

rejectedAlternatives.title: Treat test-only apply rehearsal as production readiness
rejectedAlternatives.rationale: Test-only executor does not represent real staging/production execution evidence.

futureAdrRequiredDecisions.title: Staging ownership backfill apply enablement
futureAdrRequiredDecisions.rationale: Requires explicit enablement decision with staged safeguards.
futureAdrRequiredDecisions.futureTrigger: Accepted staging design review plus approved preflight/acceptance evidence.

futureAdrRequiredDecisions.title: Production ownership backfill apply enablement
futureAdrRequiredDecisions.rationale: Requires separate production promotion and manual decision evidence.
futureAdrRequiredDecisions.futureTrigger: Accepted staging evidence, production promotion readiness, and manual decision packet.

futureAdrRequiredDecisions.title: Global EF query filter enablement
futureAdrRequiredDecisions.rationale: Must be separately reviewed for compatibility and migration impacts.

futureAdrRequiredDecisions.title: DB row-level security enablement
futureAdrRequiredDecisions.rationale: Requires operational ownership model and rollback strategy.
futureAdrRequiredDecisions.futureTrigger: Dedicated RLS ADR with operational plan and acceptance criteria.

nonClaims: No full multi-tenant isolation claim yet.
No global EF query filter claim.
